FinishReason.DEFAULT_VALUE: Default value. This is not used.
FinishReason.STOP: The model stopped naturally, or reached a specified end marker.
FinishReason.MAX_TOKENS: The maximum output length (character/word count) was reached.
FinishReason.SAFETY: The response content was blocked due to safety guidelines.
FinishReason.RECITATION: The response content was flagged for repeating or quoting existing material.
FinishReason.LANGUAGE: The response content used an unsupported language.
FinishReason.BLOCKLIST: Content generation stopped because forbidden terms were used.
FinishReason.PROHIBITED_CONTENT: Content generation stopped due to potentially prohibited content.
FinishReason.SPII: Content generation stopped because it might contain sensitive personal information (SPII).
FinishReason.MALFORMED_FUNCTION_CALL: The function call generated by the model was invalid or malformed.
FinishReason.IMAGE_SAFETY: Image generation stopped due to safety violations in the generated image.
